languageSelect.title: Choose your language
languageSelect.subtitle: You can change this later in settings when available.
languageSelect.preparingZhHint: First time only. Uses automatic translation.

onboarding.slide1Desc: Browse curated fashion and connect with suppliers in one place.
onboarding.slide2Desc: Tell us what you need — quantities, references, and timelines in a few taps.
onboarding.slide3Desc: Orders, messages, and updates stay organized so you never lose momentum.

register.title: Create your SOURCEWAVE account
register.subtitle: It's quick and easy.
register.otpPlaceholder: Enter the code from your email
register.infoBanner: We'll send you a verification code. Click it to set your password and complete registration.
register.otpInfoBanner: Enter the code emailed to you, choose a password, then create your account.
register.legalPrefix: By registering, you agree to our

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number

alerts.sendFailed: Failed to send verification link. Please try again.
alerts.otpSendFailed: Could not send verification code. Try again later.
alerts.otpInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Request a new code and try again.
alerts.otpResentBody: A new verification code was sent to your email.

legal.consentIntro: Before you create an account, please scroll through the Privacy Policy and Subscriber Terms & Conditions below. You must read both documents in full before you can continue.
legal.scrollToAccept: Scroll to the bottom to enable Accept
legal.acceptDisabledHint: Read both documents to the end to continue

forgot.title: Forgot Password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link.
forgot.subtitleOtp: We'll email you a one-time code. Enter it below with your new password.
forgot.otpStepHint: Enter the code from your email and your new password.
forgot.helpBody: Contact our support team at support@glamora.com
forgot.successSubtitle: We've sent a password reset link to:
forgot.successSubtitleOtp: You can sign in with your new password.
forgot.successInstructions: Click the link in the email to reset your password. The link will expire in 15 minutes.
forgot.successInstructionsOtp: If you did not request this, change your password from the website or contact support.
forgot.noEmailBody: Check your spam folder or try a different email address

alerts.invalidBody: Please enter a valid email address
alerts.sendFailed: Failed to send password reset link. Please try again.
alerts.otpResentBody: A new verification code was sent to your email.
alerts.resetFailed: Could not reset password. Check the code and try again.
alerts.userNotFound: No account exists for this email.

home.heroLead: Browse promos and catch up with suppliers in one place.
home.ordersEmpty: No orders yet. When you place one, it will appear here.
home.ordersSignIn: Sign in to see your orders on this device.
home.sourcewaveInfoLead: SourceWave is your mobile front door to the business: browse supplier promos on the carousel, chat with teams in Messages, and review your orders—all in one place.
home.sourcewaveInfoMore: Pull down on Home to refresh flyers and orders. Swipe the carousel to move between promos; it also advances on its own while you are on this screen.

orderDetails.title: Order details
orderDetails.errorHint: Check your connection and try again.
orderDetails.emptyItems: No line items for this order.

sourcing.pageHint: Add one or more lines below. Everything is sent as a single order with multiple items.

settings.title: Settings

editProfile.title: Edit profile
editProfile.subtitle: Saved on your account
editProfile.noPhotoBody: Add a photo first, then you can remove it anytime.
editProfile.name: Name
editProfile.notLoaded: User profile is not loaded yet.
editProfile.permissionPhotos: Please allow photo library access to set a profile picture.
editProfile.photoUpdatedBody: Your profile picture has been saved.
editProfile.removePhotoBody: Your account will show initials instead.
editProfile.photoRemovedBody: You can add a new picture anytime.

faq.noResults: No topics match. Try different words or clear filters.

subscriptionPage.title: SourceWave access
subscriptionPage.subtitle: Choose a plan · pay with card or Mobile Money
subscriptionPage.activeLead: You already have an active plan. Supplier messaging is available — you do not need to purchase again until it ends.
subscriptionPage.inactiveLead: Subscribe to unlock in-app direct supplier messaging functions and sourcing guidance on SourceWave.
subscriptionPage.promoSubtitle: Optional — enter your code before paying
subscriptionPage.promoRequired: Enter a promo code to apply.
subscriptionPage.promoInvalid: That promo code is not valid or has expired.
subscriptionPage.paySubtitle: Card, MTN MoMo, or Telecel Cash
subscriptionPage.walletHint: Use the phone registered to your mobile money account.
subscriptionPage.invalidMoMoPhone: Enter a valid Ghana mobile money number (10 digits, e.g. 0244123456).
subscriptionPage.footnote: Mobile money is approved on your phone — not inside this app. After you tap Pay, follow the steps on screen (check for an MTN/Telecel prompt or SMS), enter your MoMo PIN, then tap “I have paid”.
subscriptionPage.cardHint: Visa, Mastercard, and Verve — secured by Paystack.
subscriptionPage.cardFormHint: Enter your card number, expiry, and CVV in Paystack’s secure form below.
subscriptionPage.cardSecureNote: Card details are processed by Paystack — SourceWave never stores your card number.
subscriptionPage.cardLoadFailed: Could not load the card payment form. Check your connection and try again.
subscriptionPage.cardWebUnavailable: Card checkout is not available in the web preview. Use the mobile app instead.
subscriptionPage.signInBody: Please log in to purchase a subscription.
subscriptionPage.choosePaymentBody: Choose card, MTN Mobile Money, or Telecel Cash.
subscriptionPage.enterWalletBody: Enter the wallet number you will pay from.
subscriptionPage.completePaymentBody: Check your phone for a Mobile Money prompt or SMS. Approve the payment with your MoMo PIN, then return here and tap “I have paid”.
subscriptionPage.momoPendingLead: Paystack has sent the request to your wallet. Payment completes on your phone — the SMS is normal.
subscriptionPage.momoStep1Mtn: Check the phone with this MTN number for a Mobile Money pop-up or an SMS from Paystack/MTN.
subscriptionPage.momoStep2Mtn: Approve the payment and enter your MTN MoMo PIN when asked (or follow the USSD steps in the SMS, e.g. *170#).
subscriptionPage.momoStep1Telecel: Check the phone with this Telecel number for a Telecel Cash prompt or an SMS from Paystack.
subscriptionPage.momoStep2Telecel: Approve the payment and enter your Telecel Cash PIN when asked.
subscriptionPage.momoStep3: Return to SourceWave and tap “I have paid” below once your network confirms the deduction.
subscriptionPage.momoTimerHint: Complete approval within 3 minutes or the request may expire.
subscriptionPage.momoOtpHint: Enter the one-time code from the SMS Paystack sent you.
subscriptionPage.momoDefaultDisplay: Please complete authorization on your mobile phone.
subscriptionPage.momoFailed: The payment could not be completed. Try again or use a different wallet number.
subscriptionPage.momoOtpFailed: Could not submit OTP. Check the code and try again.
subscriptionPage.verifyNoRefBody: No payment reference yet. Try Pay again.
subscriptionPage.welcomeBody: Your plan is active until {{date}}. Reference: {{reference}}.
subscriptionPage.erpNoCustomer: Your account could not be linked for billing. Contact support if supplier access does not appear.
subscriptionPage.erpSaveFailed: Payment succeeded, but we could not confirm your plan in our system. Contact support with your payment reference.

suppliersPremium.title: SourceWave supplier access
suppliersPremium.subtitle: Active subscription required
suppliersPremium.body: Subscribe to browse suppliers, open supplier profiles, and use in-app chat with your supplier groups. Invoices stay available without this add-on.
suppliersPremium.signInBody: Log in on this device to use supplier messaging.
suppliersPremium.menuBlockedBody: Subscribe to unlock supplier directory and chat. Invoices remain available from the menu.

profile.guestSubtitle: Sign in to use your account
profile.signInBody: Sign in on this device to see your profile, orders, and shortcuts.

contactUs.title: Contact us
contactUs.subtitle: We open a support ticket for our team
contactUs.topicLabel: What do you need help with?
contactUs.topicHint: Pick the closest match — include extra detail below.
contactUs.messagePlaceholder: Describe your question, steps you tried, and what you need…
contactUs.successBody: Your ticket was created: {{id}}. Our team will follow up.
contactUs.needLogin: You need to be signed in to contact us.
contactUs.genericError: Something went wrong. Try again later.
